title: Marks Manager
description: Create a list of 5 marks. Add a new mark, remove the lowest mark, sort the list, and print the average.
starterCode:
marks = [78, 92, 85, 63, 88]

# Add 95
# Remove lowest
# Sort and print average
solution:
marks = [78, 92, 85, 63, 88]
marks.append(95)
marks.remove(min(marks))
marks.sort()
print(f"Sorted: {marks}")
print(f"Average: {sum(marks)//len(marks)}")

title: List Reversal
description: Create a list of 5 numbers. Reverse it using slicing and print both the original and reversed lists.
